  1173→async def _type_message(page: Page, config, content: str) -> bool:
  1174→    """Find message input and type content.
  1175→
  1176→    Uses progressively broader selectors. Broad selectors (bare textarea,
  1177→    contenteditable) are only tried when the current URL looks like a chat page
  1178→    to avoid typing into unrelated inputs (e.g. search bars on profile pages).
  1179→    """
  1180→    # Chat-specific selectors (always safe to try)
  1181→    chat_selectors = [
  1182→        config.get_selector('message.message_input'),
  1183→        'textarea[class*="chat"]',
  1184→        'textarea[class*="message"]',
  1185→        'textarea[class*="im-"]',
  1186→        '[class*="chat"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1187→        '[class*="im-"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1188→        '[class*="message"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1189→    ]
  1190→
  1191→    for selector in chat_selectors:
  1192→        try:
  1193→            input_elem = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=3000)
  1194→            if input_elem:
  1195→                await human_type(page, selector, content)
  1196→                logger.debug(f"Typed message in: {selector}")
  1197→                return True
  1198→        except Exception as e:
  1199→            logger.debug(f"Chat selector '{selector}' failed: {e}")
  1200→            continue
  1201→
  1202→    # Broad selectors — only try if URL suggests we're on a chat page
  1203→    current_url = page.url
  1204→    is_chat_page = any(kw in current_url for kw in ('chat', 'im/', 'uh_chat', 'message'))
  1205→
  1206→    if is_chat_page:
  1207→        broad_selectors = [
  1208→            '[contenteditable="true"]',
  1209→            'textarea',
  1210→        ]
  1211→        for selector in broad_selectors:
  1212→            try:
  1213→                input_elem = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=3000)
  1214→                if input_elem:
  1215→                    await human_type(page, selector, content)
  1216→                    logger.debug(f"Typed message in (broad, chat URL): {selector}")
  1217→                    return True
  1218→            except Exception as e:
  1219→                logger.debug(f"Broad selector '{selector}' failed: {e}")
  1220→                continue
  1221→
  1222→    logger.warning(f"Message input not found (is_chat_page={is_chat_page}, url={current_url})")
  1223→    return False

  1248→async def _verify_message_sent(page: Page, content: str, timeout: int = 5000) -> bool:
  1249→    """
  1250→    Verify that a message was actually sent by checking the conversation area.
  1251→
  1252→    Polls up to `timeout` ms with short intervals to handle async rendering.
  1253→
  1254→    Checks for:
  1255→    1. The sent message content appearing in the conversation
  1256→    2. The message input being cleared (indicating successful send)
  1257→    3. A sent/delivered indicator element
  1258→
  1259→    Args:
  1260→        page: Playwright page instance
  1261→        content: The message content that was sent
  1262→        timeout: Max time to wait for verification in ms
  1263→
  1264→    Returns:
  1265→        True if message send was verified
  1266→    """
  1267→    import time
  1268→
  1269→    # Short snippet for matching (first 20 chars, avoid template artifacts)
  1270→    snippet = content[:20].strip()
  1271→
  1272→    poll_interval_ms = 500
  1273→    deadline = time.monotonic() + timeout / 1000.0
  1274→
  1275→    while True:
  1276→        try:
  1277→            # Strategy 1: Check if message content appears in conversation area
  1278→            verified = await page.evaluate('''(snippet) => {
  1279→                const chatSelectors = [
  1280→                    '[class*="message-list"]',
  1281→                    '[class*="chat-content"]',
  1282→                    '[class*="conversation"]',
  1283→                    '[class*="msg-list"]',
  1284→                    '[class*="im-message"]',
  1285→                    '[class*="chat-msg"]',
  1286→                ];
  1287→
  1288→                for (const sel of chatSelectors) {
  1289→                    const container = document.querySelector(sel);
  1290→                    if (container && container.textContent.includes(snippet)) {
  1291→                        return true;
  1292→                    }
  1293→                }
  1294→
  1295→                // Fallback: scan leaf-ish elements in the lower portion of the page
  1296→                const viewportHeight = window.innerHeight;
  1297→                const elements = document.querySelectorAll('div, p, span');
  1298→                for (const el of elements) {
  1299→                    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
  1300→                    if (rect.top > viewportHeight * 0.3 && el.textContent.includes(snippet)) {
  1301→                        if (el.textContent.length < snippet.length + 200) {
  1302→                            return true;
  1303→                        }
  1304→                    }
  1305→                }
  1306→
  1307→                return false;
  1308→            }''', snippet)
  1309→
  1310→            if verified:
  1311→                logger.debug("Message send verified: content found in conversation")
  1312→                return True
  1313→
  1314→            # Strategy 2: Check if input was cleared (indicates successful send)
  1315→            input_cleared = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1316→                const inputs = document.querySelectorAll(
  1317→                    'textarea, [contenteditable="true"], input[type="text"]'
  1318→                );
  1319→                for (const input of inputs) {
  1320→                    const rect = input.getBoundingClientRect();
  1321→                    if (rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0) {
  1322→                        const value = input.value || input.textContent || '';
  1323→                        if (value.trim() === '') {
  1324→                            return true;
  1325→                        }
  1326→                    }
  1327→                }
  1328→                return false;
  1329→            }''')
  1330→
  1331→            if input_cleared:
  1332→                logger.debug("Message send verified: input field was cleared")
  1333→                return True
  1334→
  1335→            # Strategy 3: Check for sent/delivered indicators
  1336→            sent_indicators = [
  1337→                '[class*="sent"]',
  1338→                '[class*="delivered"]',
  1339→                '[class*="success"]',
  1340→                '[class*="msg-status"]',
  1341→            ]
  1342→            for selector in sent_indicators:
  1343→                try:
  1344→                    indicator = await page.query_selector(selector)
  1345→                    if indicator and await indicator.is_visible():
  1346→                        logger.debug(f"Message send verified: indicator found ({selector})")
  1347→                        return True
  1348→                except Exception:
  1349→                    continue
  1350→
  1351→        except Exception as e:
  1352→            logger.warning(f"Message verification poll failed: {e}")
  1353→
  1354→        # Check if we've exceeded the deadline
  1355→        if time.monotonic() >= deadline:
  1356→            break
  1357→
  1358→        await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_ms / 1000.0)
  1359→
  1360→    logger.warning("Could not verify message was sent after polling")
  1361→    return False

  1364→async def _check_existing_conversation(page: Page, maimai_id: str) -> bool:
  1365→    """
  1366→    Check if there's already an existing conversation with this candidate.
  1367→
  1368→    Checks for actual user message bubbles (not system prompts/tips) in the
  1369→    conversation area.
  1370→
  1371→    Args:
  1372→        page: Playwright page instance
  1373→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
  1374→
  1375→    Returns:
  1376→        True if an existing conversation was detected
  1377→    """
  1378→    try:
  1379→        has_conversation = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1380→            // Look for conversation message containers
  1381→            const chatSelectors = [
  1382→                '[class*="message-list"]',
  1383→                '[class*="chat-content"]',
  1384→                '[class*="conversation"]',
  1385→                '[class*="msg-list"]',
  1386→                '[class*="im-message"]',
  1387→                '[class*="chat-msg"]',
  1388→                '[class*="chat-record"]',
  1389→            ];
  1390→
  1391→            // System/tip patterns that should NOT count as existing conversation
  1392→            const systemPatterns = [
  1393→                '还不是好友', '添加好友', '发送好友申请', '对方未回复',
  1394→                '以上是打招呼内容', '暂无消息', '开始聊天', '你们已经是好友',
  1395→                '系统消息', '温馨提示', '安全提示', '注意事项',
  1396→                '开启招呼语', '求职意向', '目前情况', '竞业点',
  1397→                '欢迎联系', '不感兴趣',
  1398→            ];
  1399→
  1400→            const isSystemText = (text) => {
  1401→                const t = text.trim();
  1402→                if (t.length < 5) return true;  // Too short to be a real message
  1403→                return systemPatterns.some(p => t.includes(p));
  1404→            };
  1405→
  1406→            for (const sel of chatSelectors) {
  1407→                const container = document.querySelector(sel);
  1408→                if (!container) continue;
  1409→
  1410→                // Strategy 1: Look for message bubble elements
  1411→                const bubbleSelectors = [
  1412→                    '[class*="msg-item"]', '[class*="message-item"]',
  1413→                    '[class*="bubble"]', '[class*="chat-item"]',
  1414→                    '[class*="msg-bubble"]', '[class*="chat-bubble"]',
  1415→                ];
  1416→                for (const bSel of bubbleSelectors) {
  1417→                    const bubbles = container.querySelectorAll(bSel);
  1418→                    // Filter out system/tip bubbles
  1419→                    let realMessageCount = 0;
  1420→                    for (const bubble of bubbles) {
  1421→                        const text = bubble.textContent.trim();
  1422→                        if (text.length > 5 && !isSystemText(text)) {
  1423→                            realMessageCount++;
  1424→                        }
  1425→                    }
  1426→                    if (realMessageCount > 0) {
  1427→                        return true;
  1428→                    }
  1429→                }
  1430→
  1431→                // Strategy 2: If no bubble selectors matched, check direct children
  1432→                // that look like message blocks (not system tips)
  1433→                const children = container.children;
  1434→                let realChildCount = 0;
  1435→                for (const child of children) {
  1436→                    const text = child.textContent.trim();
  1437→                    // Must have meaningful content and not be a system message
  1438→                    if (text.length > 10 && !isSystemText(text)) {
  1439→                        // Check it's not a timestamp-only or status-only element
  1440→                        if (child.querySelector('img[class*="avatar"]') || text.length > 20) {
  1441→                            realChildCount++;
  1442→                        }
  1443→                    }
  1444→                }
  1445→                if (realChildCount > 0) {
  1446→                    return true;
  1447→                }
  1448→            }
  1449→            return false;
  1450→        }''')
  1451→
  1452→        if has_conversation:
  1453→            logger.info(f"Existing conversation detected for {maimai_id}")
  1454→        return has_conversation
  1455→
  1456→    except Exception as e:
  1457→        # On error, assume conversation exists (safe side: avoid duplicate messages)
  1458→        logger.warning(f"Conversation check failed for {maimai_id}: {e} — assuming existing conversation")
  1459→        return True
  1460→

  1462→def _get_candidate_info(db_manager, maimai_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
  1463→    """Get candidate info from database."""
  1464→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
  1465→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
  1466→        if candidate:
  1467→            return {

  1469→                'title': candidate.title,

  1475→def _log_message(
  1476→    db_manager,
  1477→    maimai_id: str,
  1478→    template_name: str,
  1479→    content: str,
  1480→    status: str
  1481→) -> None:
  1482→    """Log message to database. Creates a minimal Candidate if needed for FK."""
  1483→    try:
  1484→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
  1485→            # Ensure candidate exists for FK constraint
  1486→            existing = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
  1487→            if not existing:
  1488→                session.add(Candidate(maimai_id=maimai_id))
  1489→                session.flush()
  1490→
  1491→            message = Message(
  1492→                candidate_maimai_id=maimai_id,
  1493→                template_name=template_name,
  1494→                content=content,
  1495→                status=status,
  1496→                sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc) if status == 'sent' else None
  1497→            )
  1498→            session.add(message)
  1499→            logger.debug(f"Logged message to {maimai_id}: {status}")
  1500→    except Exception as e:
  1501→        logger.warning(
  1502→            f"AUDIT FAILURE: Failed to log message to {maimai_id} (status={status}): {e}. "
  1503→            f"This candidate may be re-messaged on next run."
  1504→        )
  1505→        # For sent messages, audit failure is critical — re-raise to prevent
  1506→        # silent duplicate messaging on the next pipeline run.
  1507→        if status == 'sent':
  1508→            raise
  1509→

  1540→async def send_message_enterprise_inline(
  1541→    page: Page,
  1542→    content: str,
  1543→    config=None,
  1544→) -> bool:
  1545→    """Send a message inline on the enterprise recruitment page.
  1546→
  1547→    This operates on the current visible candidate card — clicks "立即沟通",
  1548→    types the message in the textarea, clicks "发送后留在此页", and closes
  1549→    the popup.
  1550→
  1551→    Args:
  1552→        page: Playwright page on the enterprise results page
  1553→        content: Message content to send
  1554→        config: Config instance (loaded if None)
  1555→
  1556→    Returns:
  1557→        True if message was sent successfully
  1558→    """
  1559→    if config is None:
  1560→        config = get_config()
  1561→
  1562→    try:
  1563→        # Click 立即沟通
  1564→        chat_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.chat_now_button")
  1565→        chat_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(chat_sel, timeout=5000)
  1566→        if not chat_btn:
  1567→            logger.warning("Enterprise: 立即沟通 button not found")
  1568→            return False
  1569→
  1570→        await human_click(page, chat_sel)
  1571→        await async_random_delay("action")
  1572→
  1573→        # Wait for message textarea
  1574→        textarea_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.message_textarea")
  1575→        textarea = await page.wait_for_selector(textarea_sel, timeout=5000)
  1576→        if not textarea:
  1577→            logger.warning("Enterprise: message textarea not found")
  1578→            return False
  1579→
  1580→        # Clear any default text and type message
  1581→        await textarea.click()
  1582→        select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
  1583→        await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
  1584→        await page.keyboard.press("Backspace")
  1585→        await human_type(page, textarea_sel, content)
  1586→        await async_random_delay("action")
  1587→
  1588→        # Click 发送后留在此页
  1589→        send_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.send_stay_button")
  1590→        send_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(send_sel, timeout=5000)
  1591→        if not send_btn:
  1592→            logger.warning("Enterprise: send button not found")
  1593→            return False
  1594→
  1595→        await human_click(page, send_sel)
  1596→        await async_random_delay("action")
  1597→
  1598→        # Close popup/modal
  1599→        await _close_enterprise_popup(page)
  1600→
  1601→        # Verify message was actually sent
  1602→        verified = await _verify_message_sent(page, content)
  1603→        if not verified:
  1604→            logger.warning("Enterprise: message send could not be verified")
  1605→            return False
  1606→
  1607→        logger.info("Enterprise: message sent and verified inline")
  1608→        return True
  1609→
  1610→    except Exception as e:
  1611→        logger.error(f"Enterprise inline send failed: {e}")
  1612→        return False
  1613→

  1615→async def send_message_batch_enterprise(
  1616→    page: Page,
  1617→    candidates: List[dict],
  1618→    template_name: str,
  1619→    common_variables: Dict[str, str],
  1620→    browser: 'BrowserManager',
  1621→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
  1622→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
  1623→) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  1624→    """Batch send messages inline on the enterprise recruitment page.
  1625→
  1626→    Iterates visible candidate cards on the enterprise results page,
  1627→    sending messages inline without navigating to separate chat pages.
  1628→
  1629→    Args:
  1630→        page: Playwright page on the enterprise results page
  1631→        candidates: List of candidate dicts with maimai_id, name, company, title
  1632→        template_name: Template name to use
  1633→        common_variables: Shared template variables
  1634→        browser: Browser manager instance
  1635→        skip_messaged: Skip already-messaged candidates
  1636→
  1637→    Returns:
  1638→        Dict with total, sent, failed, skipped, rate_limited counts
  1639→    """
  1640→    config = get_config()
  1641→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
  1642→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
  1643→
  1644→    try:
  1645→        template = config.get_template(template_name)
  1646→    except Exception:
  1647→        raise ValidationError(f"Template not found: {template_name}")
  1648→
  1649→    results = {
  1650→        "total": len(candidates),
  1651→        "sent": 0,
  1652→        "failed": 0,
  1653→        "skipped": 0,
  1654→        "rate_limited": 0,
  1655→        "details": [],
  1656→    }
  1657→
  1658→    # Filter already-messaged
  1659→    send_list = []
  1660→    if skip_messaged:
  1661→        # Batch pre-fetch all sent message IDs to avoid N+1 queries
  1662→        all_ids = [c["maimai_id"] for c in candidates]
  1663→        messaged_ids = set()
  1664→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
  1665→            rows = session.query(Message.candidate_maimai_id).filter(
  1666→                Message.candidate_maimai_id.in_(all_ids),
  1667→                Message.status == "sent"
  1668→            ).distinct().all()
  1669→            messaged_ids = {row[0] for row in rows}
  1670→
  1671→        for c in candidates:
  1672→            if c["maimai_id"] in messaged_ids:
  1673→                results["skipped"] += 1
  1674→                results["details"].append({
  1675→                    "maimai_id": c["maimai_id"],
  1676→                    "name": c["name"],
  1677→                    "status": "skipped",
  1678→                    "reason": "already messaged",
  1679→                })
  1680→            else:
  1681→                send_list.append(c)
  1682→    else:
  1683→        send_list = list(candidates)
  1684→
  1685→    if not send_list:
  1686→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to send messages to.[/yellow]")
  1687→        return results
  1688→
  1689→    # Build preview
  1690→    first = send_list[0]
  1691→    first_vars = {
  1692→        **common_variables,
  1693→        "name": first["name"],
  1694→        "company": first["company"],
  1695→        "position": first["title"],
  1696→    }
  1697→    first_content = render_template(template["content"], first_vars)
  1698→
  1699→    # Display summary
  1700→    summary_text = Text()
  1701→    summary_text.append("Template: ", style="bold")
  1702→    summary_text.append(f"{template_name}\n")
  1703→    summary_text.append("Mode: ", style="bold")
  1704→    summary_text.append("Enterprise Inline\n")
  1705→    summary_text.append("Candidates: ", style="bold")
  1706→    summary_text.append(f"{len(candidates)} found, {results['skipped']} already messaged\n")
  1707→    summary_text.append("Will send to: ", style="bold")
  1708→    summary_text.append(f"{len(send_list)} candidates\n\n")
  1709→    summary_text.append("Message Preview ", style="bold cyan")
  1710→    summary_text.append(f"(first candidate):\n", style="dim")
  1711→    summary_text.append("To: ", style="bold cyan")
  1712→    recipient = first["name"]
  1713→    if first.get("title") and first.get("company"):
  1714→        recipient += f" ({first['title']} @ {first['company']})"
  1715→    summary_text.append(f"{recipient}\n\n")
  1716→    summary_text.append(first_content)
  1717→
  1718→    console.print(Panel(
  1719→        summary_text,
  1720→        title="Enterprise Pipeline Summary",
  1721→        border_style="green",
  1722→        padding=(1, 2),
  1723→    ))
  1724→
  1725→    # Confirmation
  1726→    if skip_confirmation:
  1727→        console.print(f"[green]Auto-confirmed: sending to {len(send_list)} candidates (enterprise)[/green]")
  1728→    else:
  1729→        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
  1730→        confirm = await loop.run_in_executor(
  1731→            None,
  1732→            lambda: questionary.confirm(
  1733→                f"Confirm batch send to {len(send_list)} candidates?"
  1734→            ).unsafe_ask(),
  1735→        )
  1736→
  1737→        if not confirm:
  1738→            console.print("[yellow]Batch send cancelled.[/yellow]")
  1739→            return results
  1740→
  1741→    # Send messages
  1742→    from rich.progress import Progress, BarColumn, TextColumn as ProgressTextColumn, MofNCompleteColumn
  1743→
  1744→    with Progress(
  1745→        ProgressTextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
  1746→        BarColumn(),
  1747→        MofNCompleteColumn(),
  1748→        console=console,
  1749→    ) as progress:
  1750→        task = progress.add_task("Sending messages (enterprise)...", total=len(send_list))
  1751→
  1752→        for c in send_list:
  1753→            # Rate limit check
  1754→            try:
  1755→                await async_check_rate_limit("send_message")
  1756→            except RateLimitExceededError as e:
  1757→                console.print(f"\n[yellow]Rate limit reached: {e}[/yellow]")
  1758→                remaining = len(send_list) - (results["sent"] + results["failed"])
  1759→                results["rate_limited"] = remaining
  1760→                results["details"].append({
  1761→                    "maimai_id": c["maimai_id"],
  1762→                    "name": c["name"],
  1763→                    "status": "rate_limited",
  1764→                    "reason": str(e),
  1765→                })
  1766→                break
  1767→
  1768→            # Build per-candidate variables
  1769→            variables = {
  1770→                **common_variables,
  1771→                "name": c["name"],
  1772→                "company": c["company"],
  1773→                "position": c["title"],
  1774→            }
  1775→            content = render_template(template["content"], variables)
  1776→
  1777→            # Scroll to find the candidate card (by name match)
  1778→            try:
  1779→                card_locator = page.get_by_text(c["name"], exact=False).first
  1780→                await card_locator.scroll_into_view_if_needed(timeout=5000)
  1781→                await async_random_delay("action")
  1782→            except Exception as e:
  1783→                logger.warning(f"Could not scroll to card for '{c['name']}': {e}")
  1784→
  1785→            # Send inline
  1786→            success = await send_message_enterprise_inline(page, content, config)
  1787→
  1788→            if success:
  1789→                results["sent"] += 1
  1790→                results["details"].append({
  1791→                    "maimai_id": c["maimai_id"],
  1792→                    "name": c["name"],
  1793→                    "status": "sent",
  1794→                })
  1795→                rate_limiter.log_action("send_message", {
  1796→                    "maimai_id": c["maimai_id"],
  1797→                    "template": template_name,
  1798→                    "mode": "enterprise",
  1799→                })
  1800→                _log_message(db_manager, c["maimai_id"], template_name, content, "sent")
  1801→            else:
  1802→                results["failed"] += 1
  1803→                results["details"].append({
  1804→                    "maimai_id": c["maimai_id"],
  1805→                    "name": c["name"],
  1806→                    "status": "failed",
  1807→                    "reason": "inline send returned False",
  1808→                })
  1809→                _log_message(db_manager, c["maimai_id"], template_name, content, "failed")
  1810→
  1811→            progress.advance(task)
  1812→            await async_random_delay("message")
  1813→
  1814→    return results

    53→def _is_non_rd_title(title: str) -> bool:
    54→    """Check if a title indicates a non-R&D role.
    55→
    56→    Strict mode: if any non-R&D keyword appears, filter out regardless of
    57→    whether R&D keywords are also present (e.g. "技术产品经理" is filtered).
    58→    Returns False (keep) only if title is empty or contains no non-R&D keywords.
    59→    """
    60→    if not title:
    61→        return False
    62→
    63→    # Strict: any non-R&D keyword present → filter out
    64→    if any(kw in title for kw in NON_RD_KEYWORDS):
    65→        return True
    66→
    67→    return False

    82→async def search_candidates(
    83→    keywords: str,
    84→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
    85→    location: Optional[str] = None,
    86→    pages: int = 1,
    87→    start_page: int = 1,
    88→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None
    89→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
    90→    """
    91→    Search for candidates on Maimai.
    92→
    93→    Args:
    94→        keywords: Search keywords (e.g., "高级前端工程师")
    95→        company: Filter by company names, tuple of strings (optional)
    96→        location: Filter by location (optional)
    97→        pages: Number of pages to scrape (default 1)
    98→        start_page: First page number to scrape (default 1)
    99→        browser: Browser manager instance
   100→
   101→    Returns:
   102→        List of CandidateBasic objects
   103→
   104→    Raises:
   105→        RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit exceeded
   106→        SelectorNotFoundError: If page elements not found
   107→    """
   108→    # Validate inputs
   109→    validate_keywords(keywords)
   110→
   111→    if browser is None:
   112→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   113→
   114→    config = get_config()
   115→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   116→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   117→
   118→    # Ensure logged in
   119→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   120→
   121→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   122→
   123→    with Progress(
   124→        SpinnerColumn(),
   125→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   126→        console=console
   127→    ) as progress:
   128→
   129→        end_page = start_page + pages
   130→        for page_num in range(start_page, end_page):
   131→            task = progress.add_task(f"Searching page {page_num}/{end_page - 1}...", total=None)
   132→
   133→            try:
   134→                # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval)
   135→                await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   136→
   137→                # Build search URL
   138→                params = {
   139→                    'type': 'contact',
   140→                    'query': keywords,
   141→                    'highlight': 'true'
   142→                }
   143→                if page_num > 1:
   144→                    params['page'] = str(page_num)
   145→
   146→                search_url = f"{MAIMAI_SEARCH_URL}?{urlencode(params)}"
   147→
   148→                page = browser.page
   149→
   150→                # Navigate to search page
   151→                await retry_navigation(page, search_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   152→
   153→                # Wait for page load
   154→                await async_random_delay('page_load')
   155→
   156→                # Check for captcha
   157→                await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   158→
   159→                # Click "人脉" tab to show contact results
   160→                try:
   161→                    renmai_tab = await page.query_selector('text="人脉"')
   162→                    if renmai_tab:
   163→                        await renmai_tab.click()
   164→                        logger.info("Clicked '人脉' tab")
   165→                        await async_random_delay('action')
   166→                        # Wait for content to load
   167→                        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   168→                except Exception as e:
   169→                    logger.debug(f"Could not click 人脉 tab: {e}")
   170→
   171→                # Simulate human behavior
   172→                await human_scroll(page, 'down', distance=300)
   173→                await async_random_delay('action')
   174→
   175→                # Extract candidates from this page
   176→                candidates = await _extract_search_results(page, config)
   177→
   178→                if not candidates:
   179→                    logger.info(f"No results found on page {page_num}")
   180→                    await browser.screenshot(f"search_debug_page{page_num}")
   181→                    progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: No results")
   182→                    # Allow one empty page (could be transient), break on second consecutive
   183→                    if page_num > start_page and not all_candidates:
   184→                        # First page had no results either — genuinely empty
   185→                        break
   186→                    continue
   187→
   188→                # Filter out non-R&D roles
   189→                before_rd_filter = len(candidates)
   190→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   191→                rd_filtered = before_rd_filter - len(candidates)
   192→                if rd_filtered > 0:
   193→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {rd_filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   194→
   195→                # Apply filters if specified
   196→                if company:
   197→                    company_lower = [cn.lower() for cn in company]
   198→                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]
   199→
   200→                if location:
   201→                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.location and location.lower() in c.location.lower()]
   202→
   203→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   204→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   205→
   206→                # Log the action
   207→                rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   208→                    'keywords': keywords,
   209→                    'page': page_num,
   210→                    'results': len(candidates)
   211→                })
   212→
   213→                # Save candidates to database
   214→                try:
   215→                    _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
   216→                except Exception as e:
   217→                    console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: Failed to save candidates to DB: {e}[/yellow]")
   218→
   219→                # Delay before next page
   220→                if page_num < end_page - 1:
   221→                    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   222→
   223→            except (BrowserError, SessionExpiredError):
   224→                raise  # Critical errors must propagate
   225→            except Exception as e:
   226→                logger.error(f"Error on page {page_num}: {e}")
   227→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Error - {str(e)[:30]}")
   228→                # Take screenshot for debugging
   229→                await browser.screenshot(f"search_error_page{page_num}")
   230→                continue
   231→
   232→    # Log search to history
   233→    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, location, pages, len(all_candidates))
   234→
   235→    console.print(f"[green]Search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
   236→    return all_candidates

   239→async def _extract_search_results(page: Page, config) -> List[CandidateBasic]:

   554→        # Fallback: Strategy 1 - Find all profile links directly
   555→        if not candidates:
   556→            profile_links = await page.query_selector_all('a[href*="/contact/"], a[href*="/u/"], a[href*="egid="], a[href*="profile"]')
   557→        else:
   558→            profile_links = []
   559→
   560→        if profile_links and not candidates:
   561→            logger.debug(f"Found {len(profile_links)} profile links")
   562→
   563→            seen_ids = set()
   564→            for link in profile_links:
   565→                try:
   566→                    href = await link.get_attribute('href')
   567→                    if not href:
   568→                        continue
   569→
   570→                    # Extract maimai_id from URL
   571→                    maimai_id = None
   572→                    if '/contact/detail/' in href:
   573→                        maimai_id = href.split('/contact/detail/')[-1].split('?')[0].split('/')[0]
   574→                    elif '/u/' in href:
   575→                        maimai_id = href.split('/u/')[-1].split('?')[0].split('/')[0]
   576→
   577→                    if not maimai_id or maimai_id in seen_ids:
   578→                        continue
   579→                    seen_ids.add(maimai_id)
   580→
   581→                    # Get name from link text
   582→                    name = await link.inner_text()
   583→                    name = name.strip()
   584→                    if not name or len(name) > 50:  # Skip if no name or too long (probably not a name)
   585→                        continue
   586→
   587→                    # Try to get parent container for more info
   588→                    parent = await link.evaluate_handle('el => el.closest("div, li, article") || el.parentElement.parentElement')
   589→
   590→                    title = ""
   591→                    company = ""
   592→
   593→                    if parent:
   594→                        # Get all text content and try to parse
   595→                        try:
   596→                            full_text = await parent.inner_text()
   597→                            lines = [l.strip() for l in full_text.split('\n') if l.strip()]
   598→
   599→                            # Usually: name, then title/company info
   600→                            for line in lines:
   601→                                if line == name:
   602→                                    continue
   603→                                if '好友' in line or '关注' in line:
   604→                                    continue
   605→                                if not title and len(line) < 50:
   606→                                    title = line
   607→                                elif not company and len(line) < 50:
   608→                                    company = line
   609→                                    break
   610→                        except Exception:
   611→                            pass  # Best-effort text parsing; proceed with partial data
   612→
   613→                    profile_url = href if href.startswith('http') else f"https://maimai.cn{href}"
   614→
   615→                    candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   616→                        maimai_id=maimai_id,
   617→                        name=name,
   618→                        title=title,
   619→                        company=company,
   620→                        profile_url=profile_url
   621→                    ))
   622→
   623→                except Exception as e:
   624→                    logger.debug(f"Failed to extract from link: {e}")
   625→                    continue
   626→
   627→        # Strategy 2: If no links found, try button-based detection
   628→        if not candidates:
   629→            logger.debug("Trying button-based detection")
   630→            buttons = await page.query_selector_all('button:has-text("好友"), button:has-text("关注")')
   631→
   632→            for button in buttons:
   633→                try:
   634→                    parent = await button.evaluate_handle('el => el.closest("div, li, article")')
   635→                    if not parent:
   636→                        continue
   637→
   638→                    # Find link in parent
   639→                    link = await parent.query_selector('a[href*="/contact"], a[href*="/u/"]')
   640→                    if link:
   641→                        href = await link.get_attribute('href')
   642→                        name = await link.inner_text()
   643→
   644→                        maimai_id = None
   645→                        if '/contact/detail/' in href:
   646→                            maimai_id = href.split('/contact/detail/')[-1].split('?')[0]
   647→                        elif '/u/' in href:
   648→                            maimai_id = href.split('/u/')[-1].split('?')[0]
   649→
   650→                        if maimai_id and name:
   651→                            candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   652→                                maimai_id=maimai_id,
   653→                                name=name.strip(),
   654→                                title="",
   655→                                company="",
   656→                                profile_url=href
   657→                            ))
   658→                except Exception:
   659→                    continue
   660→
   661→        # Filter out premium placeholder profiles
   662→        before_filter = len(candidates)
   663→        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
   664→        filtered_count = before_filter - len(candidates)
   665→        if filtered_count > 0:
   666→            logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered_count} premium placeholder profiles")
   667→
   668→        logger.info(f"Extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
   669→
   670→    except Exception as e:
   671→        logger.error(f"Error extracting search results: {e}")
   672→        console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: Search result extraction failed: {e}[/yellow]")
   673→
   674→    return candidates

   677→def _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates: List[CandidateBasic], source_search: str) -> None:
   678→    """
   679→    Save or update candidates in database.
   680→
   681→    Args:
   682→        db_manager: Database manager instance
   683→        candidates: List of candidates to save
   684→        source_search: Search keywords that found these candidates
   685→    """
   686→    try:
   687→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   688→            # Batch pre-fetch existing candidates to avoid N+1 queries
   689→            maimai_ids = [c.maimai_id for c in candidates]
   690→            existing_by_id = {
   691→                row.maimai_id: row
   692→                for row in session.query(Candidate).filter(
   693→                    Candidate.maimai_id.in_(maimai_ids)
   694→                ).all()
   695→            }
   696→
   697→            # Also batch-fetch by name+company for dedup
   698→            name_company_pairs = [(c.name, c.company) for c in candidates]
   699→            from sqlalchemy import tuple_
   700→            existing_by_name = {}
   701→            if name_company_pairs:
   702→                for row in session.query(Candidate).filter(
   703→                    tuple_(Candidate.name, Candidate.company).in_(name_company_pairs)
   704→                ).all():
   705→                    existing_by_name[(row.name, row.company)] = row
   706→
   707→            for c in candidates:
   708→                existing = existing_by_id.get(c.maimai_id)
   709→                if not existing:
   710→                    existing = existing_by_name.get((c.name, c.company))
   711→
   712→                if existing:
   713→                    existing.name = c.name
   714→                    existing.title = c.title
   715→                    existing.company = c.company
   716→                    existing.location = c.location
   717→                    existing.profile_url = c.profile_url
   718→                else:
   719→                    candidate = Candidate(
   720→                        maimai_id=c.maimai_id,
   721→                        name=c.name,
   722→                        title=c.title,
   723→                        company=c.company,
   724→                        location=c.location,
   725→                        profile_url=c.profile_url,
   726→                        source_search=source_search
   727→                    )
   728→                    session.add(candidate)
   729→
   730→            logger.debug(f"Saved {len(candidates)} candidates to database")
   731→
   732→    except Exception as e:
   733→        logger.error(f"Failed to save candidates to database: {e}")
   734→        raise

   762→async def _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page: Page, name: str, company: str) -> Optional[str]:
   763→    """Try to extract profile URL for a candidate from the DOM contactcard pattern.
   764→
   765→    Searches the current page for a contactcard element whose parent card
   766→    contains the candidate's name (and optionally company), then constructs
   767→    the profile URL from the extracted user ID.
   768→
   769→    Args:
   770→        page: Playwright page on the search results
   771→        name: Candidate name to match
   772→        company: Candidate company to help disambiguate
   773→
   774→    Returns:
   775→        Profile URL string, or None if not found
   776→    """
   777→    try:
   778→        user_id = await page.evaluate('''(args) => {
   779→            const { name, company } = args;
   780→            // Check contactcard_{numeric_id} ancestors
   781→            const ccElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   782→            for (const el of ccElements) {
   783→                const text = el.textContent || '';
   784→                if (!text.includes(name)) continue;
   785→                if (company && !text.includes(company)) continue;
   786→                const match = el.id.match(/^contactcard_(\\d+)$/);
   787→                if (match) return match[1];
   788→            }
   789→            // Check member_entry_{numeric_id} descendants
   790→            const meElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="member_entry_"]');
   791→            for (const el of meElements) {
   792→                // Walk up to find the card containing this member_entry
   793→                let card = el.parentElement;
   794→                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   795→                    const text = card.textContent || '';
   796→                    if (text.includes(name) && (!company || text.includes(company))) {
   797→                        const match = el.id.match(/^member_entry_(\\d+)$/);
   798→                        if (match) return match[1];
   799→                    }
   800→                    card = card.parentElement;
   801→                }
   802→            }
   803→            return null;
   804→        }''', {'name': name, 'company': company})
   805→
   806→        if user_id:
   807→            profile_url = f"https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/{user_id}?dstu={user_id}"
   808→            logger.info(f"Resolved profile_url for '{name}' via contactcard: {profile_url}")
   809→            return profile_url
   810→
   811→        logger.debug(f"No contactcard found for '{name}'")
   812→        return None
   813→
   814→    except Exception as e:
   815→        logger.debug(f"_click_avatar_for_profile_url error for '{name}': {e}")
   816→        return None
   817→

   819→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   820→# Enterprise recruitment path (Path B)
   821→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   822→
   823→MAIMAI_HOME_URL = "https://maimai.cn"
   824→ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER = "ent/talents/discover"

   826→
   827→async def search_candidates_enterprise(
   828→    keywords: str,
   829→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
   830→    pages: int = 1,
   831→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   832→    keep_tab_open: bool = False,
   833→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   834→    """Search for candidates via the enterprise recruitment path.
   835→
   836→    Flow:
   837→    1. Switch to primary tab -> navigate to homepage -> click "招聘" tab (opens new tab)
   838→    2. Wait for enterprise page to load
   839→    3. Add keyword filter -> submit
   840→    4. Optionally add company filter
   841→    5. Extract candidates from enterprise card layout
   842→    6. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
   843→    7. Close enterprise tab unless keep_tab_open is True
   844→
   845→    Args:
   846→        keywords: Search keywords
   847→        company: Filter by company names (optional)
   848→        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
   849→        browser: Browser manager instance
   850→        keep_tab_open: If True, leave enterprise tab open (for inline messaging)
   851→
   852→    Returns:
   853→        List of CandidateBasic objects
   854→    """
   855→    validate_keywords(keywords)
   856→
   857→    if browser is None:
   858→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   859→
   860→    config = get_config()
   861→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   862→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   863→
   864→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   865→
   866→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   867→    enterprise_tab_opened = False
   868→
   869→    with Progress(
   870→        SpinnerColumn(),
   871→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   872→        console=console,
   873→    ) as progress:
   874→        task = progress.add_task("Opening enterprise recruitment...", total=None)
   875→
   876→        try:
   877→            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
   878→
   879→            # Always start from the primary tab to avoid navigating user's open content
   880→            browser.switch_to_primary_tab()
   881→            page = browser.page
   882→
   883→            # Step 1: Navigate to homepage and click 招聘 tab
   884→            await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_HOME_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   885→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
   886→
   887→            sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.recruitment_tab")
   888→            recruitment_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=5000)
   889→            if not recruitment_tab:
   890→                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find recruitment tab: {sel}")
   891→
   892→            # Click opens a new tab — use BrowserManager API
   893→            await recruitment_tab.click()
   894→            page = await browser.wait_for_new_tab(timeout=15000)
   895→            enterprise_tab_opened = True
   896→
   897→            progress.update(task, description="Enterprise page loaded")
   898→
   899→            # Wait for the enterprise page URL
   900→            try:
   901→                await page.wait_for_url(
   902→                    lambda url: ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER in url,
   903→                    timeout=15000,
   904→                )
   905→            except Exception:
   906→                logger.warning(f"Enterprise URL marker not found, current URL: {page.url}")
   907→
   908→            await async_random_delay("action")
   909→
   910→            # Step 2: Add keyword
   911→            progress.update(task, description=f"Adding keyword: {keywords}")
   912→
   913→            add_kw_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_keyword_button")
   914→            add_kw_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_kw_sel, timeout=5000)
   915→            if add_kw_btn:
   916→                await add_kw_btn.click()
   917→                await async_random_delay("action")
   918→
   919→            kw_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_input")
   920→            await page.wait_for_selector(kw_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   921→            await human_type(page, kw_input_sel, keywords)
   922→            await async_random_delay("action")
   923→
   924→            kw_submit_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_submit")
   925→            submit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(kw_submit_sel, timeout=3000)
   926→            if submit_btn:
   927→                await submit_btn.click()
   928→                await async_random_delay("page_load")
   929→
   930→            # Step 3: Add company filter if specified
   931→            if company:
   932→                progress.update(task, description="Adding company filter...")
   933→                add_co_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_company_button")
   934→                add_co_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_co_sel, timeout=5000)
   935→                if add_co_btn:
   936→                    await add_co_btn.click()
   937→                    await async_random_delay("action")
   938→
   939→                co_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.company_input")
   940→                for co_name in company:
   941→                    await page.wait_for_selector(co_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   942→                    await human_type(page, co_input_sel, co_name)
   943→                    await async_random_delay("action")
   944→
   945→                    # Click suggestion dropdown item
   946→                    try:
   947→                        suggestion = await page.wait_for_selector(
   948→                            f"text='{co_name}'", timeout=3000
   949→                        )
   950→                        if suggestion:
   951→                            await suggestion.click()
   952→                            await async_random_delay("action")
   953→                    except Exception:
   954→                        logger.debug(f"Company suggestion not found for: {co_name}")
   955→
   956→            # Step 4: Wait for results and extract
   957→            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   958→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   959→
   960→            for page_num in range(1, pages + 1):
   961→                progress.update(task, description=f"Extracting page {page_num}/{pages}...")
   962→
   963→                candidates = await _extract_enterprise_results(page)
   964→
   965→                if not candidates:
   966→                    logger.info(f"No enterprise results on page {page_num}")
   967→                    break
   968→
   969→                # Filter non-R&D roles
   970→                before_filter = len(candidates)
   971→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   972→                filtered = before_filter - len(candidates)
   973→                if filtered > 0:
   974→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   975→
   976→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   977→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   978→
   979→                rate_limiter.log_action("search", {
   980→                    "keywords": keywords,
   981→                    "page": page_num,
   982→                    "results": len(candidates),
   983→                    "mode": "enterprise",
   984→                })
   985→
   986→                try:
   987→                    _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
   988→                except Exception as e:
   989→                    console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: Failed to save candidates to DB: {e}[/yellow]")
   990→
   991→                # Scroll for next page (infinite scroll)
   992→                if page_num < pages:
   993→                    await human_scroll(page, "down", distance=800)
   994→                    await async_random_delay("page_load")
   995→                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   996→
   997→        except Exception as e:
   998→            logger.error(f"Enterprise search error: {e}")
   999→            await browser.screenshot("enterprise_search_error")
  1000→            progress.update(task, description=f"Error: {str(e)[:40]}")
  1001→        finally:
  1002→            # Close the enterprise tab unless caller wants it open for inline messaging
  1003→            if enterprise_tab_opened and not keep_tab_open:
  1004→                try:
  1005→                    await browser.close_current_tab()
  1006→                except Exception:
  1007→                    pass  # Best-effort cleanup; tab may already be closed
  1008→
  1009→    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, None, pages, len(all_candidates))
  1010→
  1011→    console.print(f"[green]Enterprise search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
  1012→    return all_candidates

  1015→async def _extract_enterprise_results(page: Page) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
  1016→    """Extract candidate information from enterprise recruitment results page.
  1017→
  1018→    The enterprise UI has a different card layout from search_center.
  1019→    Uses JS-based extraction tailored to the enterprise talent cards.
  1020→
  1021→    Args:
  1022→        page: Playwright page instance on the enterprise results page
  1023→
  1024→    Returns:
  1025→        List of CandidateBasic objects
  1026→    """
  1027→    candidates = []
  1028→
  1029→    try:
  1030→        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=10000)
  1031→    except Exception:
  1032→        pass  # Continue even if networkidle times out
  1033→
  1034→    try:
  1035→        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1036→            const candidates = [];
  1037→            const seenIds = new Set();
  1038→
  1039→            // Enterprise talent cards typically have a structured layout
  1040→            // Try multiple selectors for the card containers
  1041→            const cardSelectors = [
  1042→                '[class*="talent-card"]',
  1043→                '[class*="candidate-card"]',
  1044→                '[class*="recommend-card"]',
  1045→                '[class*="talent-item"]',
  1046→                '[class*="card-wrap"]',
  1047→            ];
  1048→
  1049→            let cards = [];
  1050→            for (const sel of cardSelectors) {
  1051→                cards = document.querySelectorAll(sel);
  1052→                if (cards.length > 0) break;
  1053→            }
  1054→
  1055→            // Fallback: find cards by avatar image pattern (same as search_center)
  1056→            if (cards.length === 0) {
  1057→                const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
  1058→                const foundCards = [];
  1059→
  1060→                for (const img of images) {
  1061→                    const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
  1062→                    if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
  1063→                    if (rect.width < 30 || rect.height < 30) continue;
  1064→
  1065→                    let card = img.parentElement;
  1066→                    for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
  1067→                        const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
  1068→                        if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 80) {
  1069→                            break;
  1070→                        }
  1071→                        card = card.parentElement;
  1072→                    }
  1073→                    if (card) foundCards.push(card);
  1074→                }
  1075→                cards = foundCards;
  1076→            }
  1077→
  1078→            for (const card of cards) {
  1079→                const textParts = [];
  1080→                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
  1081→                while (walker.nextNode()) {
  1082→                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
  1083→                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
  1084→                        textParts.push(text);
  1085→                    }
  1086→                }
  1087→
  1088→                let name = '';
  1089→                let company = '';
  1090→                let title = '';
  1091→
  1092→                const skipPatterns = [
  1093→                    /^立即沟通$/,
  1094→                    /^不合适$/,
  1095→                    /^感兴趣$/,
  1096→                    /^不感兴趣$/,
  1097→                    /^(\\d+\\s*)?年/,
  1098→                    /^[|｜·]$/,
  1099→                    /^在线|^离线|^活跃/,
  1100→                ];
  1101→
  1102→                const isSkippable = (text) => {
  1103→                    return skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text));
  1104→                };
  1105→
  1106→                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
  1107→                    const part = textParts[i];
  1108→                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
  1109→
  1110→                    if (!name && part.length >= 2 && part.length <= 15) {
  1111→                        if (/^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z·\\s]+$/.test(part)) {
  1112→                            name = part;
  1113→                            continue;
  1114→                        }
  1115→                    }
  1116→
  1117→                    if (name && !company && part.length > 1) {
  1118→                        company = part;
  1119→                        continue;
  1120→                    }
  1121→
  1122→                    if (name && company && !title && part.length > 1) {
  1123→                        title = part;
  1124→                        break;
  1125→                    }
  1126→                }
  1127→
  1128→                if (!name) continue;
  1129→

   113→    def __init__(self, db_path: Optional[str] = None):

   122→
   123→        # Create engine and session

   125→        self.db_path = db_path
   126→        self.engine = create_engine(
   127→            f'sqlite:///{db_path}',
   128→            echo=False,
   129→            poolclass=StaticPool,
   130→            connect_args={"check_same_thread": False},
   131→        )
   132→        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
   133→
   134→        # Auto-create tables and run migrations

   139→    def init_db(self):
   140→        """Create all tables and run pending migrations."""

   143→
   144→        from src.models.migrations import run_migrations
   145→        run_migrations(self.engine)
   146→
   147→    @contextmanager
   148→    def session_scope(self):
   149→        """Provide a transactional scope with auto commit/rollback/close."""
   150→        session = self.Session()
   151→        try:
   152→            yield session
   153→            session.commit()
   154→        except Exception:
   155→            session.rollback()
   156→            raise
   157→        finally:
   158→            session.close()
   159→
   160→    def drop_all(self):

   162→        Base.metadata.drop_all(self.engine)
   163→        logger.warning("All database tables dropped")

   166→# Global database manager instance

   172→    global _db_manager

1→"""Rate limiter for preventing account bans."""
     2→
     3→import asyncio
     4→from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
     5→from typing import Tuple, Optional
     6→
     7→from loguru import logger
     8→from sqlalchemy import func
     9→
    10→from src.models.database import ActionLog, get_db_manager, DatabaseManager
    11→from src.utils.config import get_config, Config
    12→from src.exceptions.errors import RateLimitExceededError
    13→
    14→
    15→class RateLimiter:
    16→    """Rate limiter for controlling action frequency.
    17→
    18→    Supports adaptive throttling: when captchas or errors are reported,
    19→    limits are temporarily tightened to reduce detection risk.
    20→    """
    21→
    22→    def __init__(self, config: Optional[Config] = None, db_manager: Optional[DatabaseManager] = None):
    23→        """Initialize rate limiter with configuration.
    24→
    25→        Args:
    26→            config: Config instance (uses global singleton if None)
    27→            db_manager: DatabaseManager instance (uses global singleton if None)
    28→        """
    29→        self.config = config or get_config()
    30→        self.db_manager = db_manager or get_db_manager()
    31→
    32→        # Adaptive throttle state
    33→        self._throttle_factor: float = 1.0  # 1.0 = normal, <1.0 = stricter
    34→        self._captcha_timestamps: list = []
    35→        self._pruned: bool = False  # one-time prune flag
    36→
    37→    def report_captcha(self) -> None:
    38→        """Report a captcha occurrence to trigger adaptive throttling."""
    39→        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    40→        self._captcha_timestamps.append(now)
    41→        # Keep only last 30 minutes of captcha events
    42→        cutoff = now - timedelta(minutes=30)
    43→        self._captcha_timestamps = [t for t in self._captcha_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    44→        self._update_throttle_factor()
    45→
    46→    def _update_throttle_factor(self) -> None:
    47→        """Recalculate throttle factor based on recent captcha frequency.
    48→
    49→        Throttle factor ranges from 1.0 (normal) to 0.3 (heavily throttled).
    50→        - 1 captcha in 30min: reduce to 0.7x (30% fewer operations allowed)
    51→        - 2 captchas: reduce to 0.5x
    52→        - 3+ captchas: reduce to 0.3x
    53→        """
    54→        captcha_count = len(self._captcha_timestamps)
    55→
    56→        if captcha_count >= 3:
    57→            self._throttle_factor = 0.3
    58→        elif captcha_count >= 2:
    59→            self._throttle_factor = 0.5
    60→        elif captcha_count >= 1:
    61→            self._throttle_factor = 0.7
    62→        else:
    63→            self._throttle_factor = 1.0
    64→
    65→        if self._throttle_factor < 1.0:
    66→            logger.warning(
    67→                f"Adaptive throttle active: factor={self._throttle_factor:.1f} "
    68→                f"(captchas={captcha_count} in last 30min)"
    69→            )
    70→
    71→    def _refresh_throttle(self) -> None:
    72→        """Prune expired timestamps and recalculate throttle factor."""
    73→        cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(minutes=30)
    74→        self._captcha_timestamps = [t for t in self._captcha_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    75→        self._update_throttle_factor()
    76→
    77→    @property
    78→    def throttle_factor(self) -> float:
    79→        """Current adaptive throttle factor (1.0 = normal, <1.0 = throttled)."""
    80→        return self._throttle_factor
    81→
    82→    def _get_limits(self, action_type: str) -> Tuple[int, int, int]:
    83→        """
    84→        Get rate limits for an action type, adjusted by adaptive throttle.
    85→
    86→        Args:
    87→            action_type: Type of action ('search', 'view_profile', 'send_message')
    88→
    89→        Returns:
    90→            Tuple of (per_hour_limit, per_day_limit, min_interval_seconds)
    91→        """
    92→        action_map = {
    93→            'search': ('search_per_hour', 'search_per_day'),
    94→            'view_profile': ('profile_view_per_hour', 'profile_view_per_day'),
    95→            'send_message': ('message_per_hour', 'message_per_day'),
    96→        }
    97→
    98→        if action_type not in action_map:
    99→            raise ValueError(f"Unknown action type: {action_type}")
   100→
   101→        hour_key, day_key = action_map[action_type]
   102→
   103→        per_hour = self.config.get(f'rate_limits.{hour_key}', 20)
   104→        per_day = self.config.get(f'rate_limits.{day_key}', 100)
   105→        min_interval = self.config.get('rate_limits.min_interval_seconds', 30)
   106→
   107→        # Apply adaptive throttle: reduce limits and increase interval
   108→        per_hour = max(1, int(per_hour * self._throttle_factor))
   109→        per_day = max(1, int(per_day * self._throttle_factor))
   110→        if self._throttle_factor < 1.0:
   111→            min_interval = int(min_interval / self._throttle_factor)
   112→
   113→        return per_hour, per_day, min_interval
   114→
   115→    def _count_actions(self, action_type: str, since: datetime) -> int:
   116→        """
   117→        Count actions of a type since a given time.
   118→
   119→        Args:
   120→            action_type: Type of action
   121→            since: Count actions since this time
   122→
   123→        Returns:
   124→            Number of actions
   125→        """
   126→        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   127→            count = session.query(func.count(ActionLog.id)).filter(
   128→                ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   129→                ActionLog.timestamp >= since
   130→            ).scalar()
   131→
   132→            return count or 0
   133→
   134→    @staticmethod
   135→    def _ensure_aware(dt: Optional[datetime]) -> Optional[datetime]:
   136→        """Attach UTC timezone to naive datetimes returned by SQLite."""
   137→        if dt is not None and dt.tzinfo is None:
   138→            return dt.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   139→        return dt
   140→
   141→    def _get_last_action_time(self, action_type: Optional[str] = None) -> Optional[datetime]:
   142→        """
   143→        Get timestamp of last action.
   144→
   145→        Args:
   146→            action_type: Type of action, or None for any action
   147→
   148→        Returns:
   149→            Timestamp of last action (timezone-aware), or None if no actions
   150→        """
   151→        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   152→            query = session.query(func.max(ActionLog.timestamp))
   153→
   154→            if action_type:
   155→                query = query.filter(ActionLog.action_type == action_type)
   156→
   157→            last_time = query.scalar()
   158→            return self._ensure_aware(last_time)
   159→
   160→    def check_rate_limit(self, action_type: str) -> None:
   161→        """
   162→        Check if action is allowed under rate limits.
   163→
   164→        Args:
   165→            action_type: Type of action to check
   166→
   167→        Raises:
   168→            RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit is exceeded
   169→        """
   170→        # Prune stale entries once per session to keep counts accurate
   171→        if not self._pruned:
   172→            self.prune_old_entries()
   173→            self._pruned = True
   174→
   175→        self._refresh_throttle()
   176→        per_hour, per_day, min_interval = self._get_limits(action_type)
   177→
   178→        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   179→        one_hour_ago = now - timedelta(hours=1)
   180→        one_day_ago = now - timedelta(days=1)
   181→
   182→        # Check hourly limit
   183→        hourly_count = self._count_actions(action_type, one_hour_ago)
   184→        if hourly_count >= per_hour:
   185→            # Calculate wait time until oldest action expires
   186→            with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   187→                oldest_in_window = session.query(ActionLog.timestamp).filter(
   188→                    ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   189→                    ActionLog.timestamp >= one_hour_ago
   190→                ).order_by(ActionLog.timestamp.asc()).first()
   191→
   192→                if oldest_in_window:
   193→                    oldest_ts = self._ensure_aware(oldest_in_window[0])
   194→                    wait_until = oldest_ts + timedelta(hours=1)
   195→                    wait_seconds = max(1, int((wait_until - now).total_seconds()))
   196→                else:
   197→                    wait_seconds = 3600
   198→
   199→            raise RateLimitExceededError(
   200→                action_type=action_type,
   201→                wait_time=wait_seconds,
   202→                message=f"Hourly rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. "
   203→                        f"Limit: {per_hour}/hour. Wait {wait_seconds // 60} minutes."
   204→            )
   205→
   206→        # Check daily limit
   207→        daily_count = self._count_actions(action_type, one_day_ago)
   208→        if daily_count >= per_day:
   209→            with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   210→                oldest_in_window = session.query(ActionLog.timestamp).filter(
   211→                    ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   212→                    ActionLog.timestamp >= one_day_ago
   213→                ).order_by(ActionLog.timestamp.asc()).first()
   214→
   215→                if oldest_in_window:
   216→                    oldest_ts = self._ensure_aware(oldest_in_window[0])
   217→                    wait_until = oldest_ts + timedelta(days=1)
   218→                    wait_seconds = max(1, int((wait_until - now).total_seconds()))
   219→                else:
   220→                    wait_seconds = 86400
   221→
   222→            raise RateLimitExceededError(
   223→                action_type=action_type,
   224→                wait_time=wait_seconds,
   225→                message=f"Daily rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. "
   226→                        f"Limit: {per_day}/day. Wait {wait_seconds // 3600} hours."
   227→            )
   228→
   229→        # Check minimum interval (per-action-type to avoid cross-type blocking)
   230→        last_action = self._get_last_action_time(action_type)
   231→        if last_action:
   232→            elapsed = (now - last_action).total_seconds()
   233→            if elapsed < min_interval:
   234→                wait_seconds = max(1, int(min_interval - elapsed))
   235→                raise RateLimitExceededError(
   236→                    action_type='any',
   237→                    wait_time=wait_seconds,
   238→                    message=f"Minimum interval not met. Wait {wait_seconds} seconds."
   239→                )
   240→
   241→        logger.debug(f"Rate limit check passed for {action_type}")
   242→
   243→    def log_action(self, action_type: str, details: Optional[dict] = None) -> None:
   244→        """
   245→        Log an action to the database.
   246→
   247→        Args:
   248→            action_type: Type of action
   249→            details: Optional action details
   250→        """
   251→        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   252→            action_log = ActionLog(
   253→                action_type=action_type,
   254→                timestamp=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
   255→                details=details or {}
   256→            )
   257→            session.add(action_log)
   258→
   259→        logger.debug(f"Logged action: {action_type}")
   260→
   261→    def prune_old_entries(self, retention_hours: int = 48) -> int:
   262→        """Remove ActionLog entries older than the retention window.
   263→
   264→        This prevents stale counts from accumulating across sessions and
   265→        keeps the ActionLog table from growing indefinitely.
   266→
   267→        Args:
   268→            retention_hours: Delete entries older than this many hours (default 48)
   269→
   270→        Returns:
   271→            Number of entries deleted
   272→        """
   273→        cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(hours=retention_hours)
   274→        try:
   275→            with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   276→                count = session.query(ActionLog).filter(
   277→                    ActionLog.timestamp < cutoff
   278→                ).delete()
   279→                logger.debug(f"Pruned {count} old ActionLog entries (older than {retention_hours}h)")
   280→                return count
   281→        except Exception as e:
   282→            logger.error(f"Failed to prune ActionLog entries: {e}")
   283→            return 0
   284→
   285→    def get_quota_status(self, action_type: str) -> dict:
   286→        """
   287→        Get current quota status for an action type.
   288→
   289→        Args:
   290→            action_type: Type of action
   291→
   292→        Returns:
   293→            Dictionary with quota information
   294→        """
   295→        per_hour, per_day, _ = self._get_limits(action_type)
   296→
   297→        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   298→        one_hour_ago = now - timedelta(hours=1)
   299→        one_day_ago = now - timedelta(days=1)
   300→
   301→        hourly_used = self._count_actions(action_type, one_hour_ago)
   302→        daily_used = self._count_actions(action_type, one_day_ago)
   303→
   304→        return {
   305→            'action_type': action_type,
   306→            'hourly': {
   307→                'used': hourly_used,
   308→                'limit': per_hour,
   309→                'remaining': max(0, per_hour - hourly_used)
   310→            },
   311→            'daily': {
   312→                'used': daily_used,
   313→                'limit': per_day,
   314→                'remaining': max(0, per_day - daily_used)
   315→            }
   316→        }

   319→async def async_check_rate_limit(
   320→    action_type: str,
   321→    max_retries: int = 60,
   322→    max_total_wait: int = 1800,
   323→) -> None:
   324→    """
   325→    Check rate limit, waiting through any violations until the action is allowed.
   326→
   327→    Blocks until the rate limit clears. Raises RateLimitExceededError if
   328→    still blocked after max_retries attempts or max_total_wait seconds
   329→    (prevents hanging for hours when daily limits are hit).
   330→
   331→    Args:
   332→        action_type: Type of action to check
   333→        max_retries: Maximum wait-retry cycles before giving up
   334→        max_total_wait: Maximum total seconds to wait before giving up (default 30 min)
   335→    """
   336→    import time
   337→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   338→    start = time.monotonic()
   339→    for attempt in range(max_retries):
   340→        try:
   341→            rate_limiter.check_rate_limit(action_type)
   342→            return
   343→        except RateLimitExceededError as e:
   344→            elapsed = time.monotonic() - start
   345→            if attempt >= max_retries - 1 or elapsed + e.wait_time > max_total_wait:
   346→                raise
   347→            wait = e.wait_time + 1  # +1s buffer
   348→            logger.info(f"Rate limit hit: {e}. Waiting {wait}s before retrying (attempt {attempt + 1}/{max_retries}, elapsed {elapsed:.0f}s)...")
   349→            await asyncio.sleep(wait)
   350→
   351→
   352→# Global rate limiter instance
   353→_rate_limiter = None
   354→
   355→
   356→def get_rate_limiter() -> RateLimiter:
   357→    """Get global rate limiter instance."""
   358→    global _rate_limiter
   359→    if _rate_limiter is None:
   360→        _rate_limiter = RateLimiter()
   361→    return _rate_limiter
   362→

   449→async def run_pipeline_batched(
   450→    browser: BrowserManager,
   451→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   452→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   453→    location: Optional[str],
   454→    max_pages: int,

   457→    variables: Dict[str, str],

   462→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   463→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   464→) -> None:
   465→    """Batched pipeline: search N pages, send messages, repeat."""
   466→    from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in, check_login_status
   467→    from src.core.session import get_session_manager
   468→    from src.utils.checkpoint import CheckpointManager
   469→
   470→    # Restore state from checkpoint or start fresh
   471→    if resume_ckpt:
   472→        # On resume, only treat sent_ids as truly "seen" (skip-worthy).
   473→        # Candidates that were found but not sent should be retried.
   474→        sent_ids = list(resume_ckpt.sent_ids)
   475→        seen_ids = set(sent_ids)  # only skip candidates already successfully sent
   476→        total_results = resume_ckpt.total_results or {
   477→            'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0,
   478→        }
